summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard features including RBAC, User Management, and Pricing Management. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed all features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin dashboard features fully tested. RBAC, pricing management, and user role management all working correctly.

admin_dashboard_loads.details: Admin dashboard loads at /admin route with all sections visible

stat_cards_displayed.details: Total Users (12), Schools (1), Total Teams (54), Total Games (75) displayed correctly

users_table_role_column.details: Role column displays Primary Admin, Admin, and User badges correctly

users_table_tier_column.details: Tier column displays Bronze badges with correct styling

pricing_management_section.details: Collapsible section shows Bronze (Free), Silver ($15/mo), Gold ($20/mo) tiers

edit_pricing_button.details: Edit Pricing button opens edit mode with input fields for prices and features

grant_admin_dialog.details: UserCog icon opens Grant Admin Access dialog with user info and role transition

primary_admin_protection.details: Primary admin users cannot be deleted or have role changed (403 returned)

api_admin_pricing_get.details: GET /api/admin/pricing returns pricing config with all 3 tiers

GET /api/admin/users.details: Returns users with effective_role, subscription_tier, subscription_status fields

GET /api/admin/pricing.details: Returns pricing config with bronze, silver, gold tiers

DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id}.details: Returns 403 when trying to delete primary admin

ui_elements_verified: Admin Dashboard title with Shield icon
